column1: # JLCPCB CPL rotation corrections for picoarc.  Columns: kind
#   kind=fp   -> key is a regex matched against the footprint name (first match wins
#   kind=ref  -> key is an exact designator; overrides any fp rule (use for connectors/one-offs)
# The `degrees` value is ADDED to KiCad's exported rotation
# KiCad's footprint 0deg orientation differs from JLCPCB's part-library orientation for many
# packages; these are the community-standard corrections (JLCKicadTools cpl_rotations_db).
# VERIFY EVERY PART against JLCPCB's placement preview after upload. Seeds below cover the
# standard IC packages on this board. NOT corrected (verify
